raw_text: Hi, I placed an order ORD-4892 almost 17 days ago and it still hasn't arrived. The tracking hasn't updated in a week. This is really frustrating — I needed these sneakers for an event this weekend. Can someone please look into this urgently?
Hey, just checking on my order ORD-5021. It says delivered but I want to confirm everything is good. Thanks!
I want to cancel my order ORD-6610. I placed it yesterday and I changed my mind about the colour. Please cancel it before it ships.

My order ORD-7741 has been stuck on 'in transit' for over two weeks and now the tracking says it might be lost. This is unacceptable! I paid ₹4500 for those shoes and I want either my shoes or a full refund immediately. I'm extremely disappointed with Stryde.
I received my order ORD-8832 but the shoes are the wrong size. I ordered UK 9 but received UK 7. I've already initiated a return through the app. How long will the replacement take?
Can you tell me the status of order ORD-9901? I placed it a few days ago and I'm curious when it will arrive.
I'm looking at the Stryde Runner Pro on your website. Does it come in wide fit? I have slightly wider feet and I'm between UK 10 and UK 11. What would you recommend?
I WAS CHARGED TWICE FOR MY ORDER! I can see two transactions of ₹3299 on my credit card statement. This is absolutely ridiculous. Fix this NOW or I'm filing a chargeback. Order number is ORD-9999.
Hi there, I'd like to know more about your return policy. If I buy sneakers and they don't fit, can I return them? Is there a time limit?
What payment methods do you accept? I want to use UPI but also wondering if you have any EMI options for expensive orders.

I returned a pair of sneakers 10 days ago and still haven't received my refund. The return was picked up by Delhivery and I have the receipt. When will I get my money back? This is taking way too long.
Your shipping is terrible. I've ordered from you three times and every single time the delivery is late. 12 days for what you call '5-7 business days' delivery. I'm done with Stryde honestly.
Hello, I was wondering about the Stryde Rewards program. How do I earn points and what can I redeem them for? Also do points expire?

I received the wrong item in my order. I ordered the Stryde Urban Black sneakers but got some white running shoes instead. I'm very annoyed because this was supposed to be a gift. I don't even have an order number handy right now.
Do your sneakers come with any warranty? I bought a pair 4 months ago and the sole is already separating from the upper. This shouldn't happen with a premium brand.
Hi, just wanted to say I love the new Stryde Flex collection! The comfort is amazing. Keep up the great work team!
I need to cancel my order. I accidentally ordered two pairs instead of one. Please cancel the duplicate order as soon as possible.
How long does express shipping take? I need a pair of sneakers delivered to Mumbai by this Friday. Is that possible if I order today?
I was charged ₹2999 twice on my UPI for order ORD-4892. One payment went through but the second one also got debited. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.

entities.product_name: Stryde Runner and Stryde Runner Pro

raw_text: What's the difference between the Stryde Runner and the Stryde Runner Pro? Is the Pro worth the extra ₹1500? I mainly use them for daily jogging.
I want to return a hoodie I bought last week. It's too large. Can I exchange it for a medium instead of getting a refund?
My order has been showing 'processing' for 5 days now. When will it actually ship? I expected faster service from a premium brand.
Could you help me understand your size chart? I usually wear US 10 in Nike. What would be the equivalent Stryde size in UK sizing?

I'm so angry right now. I've been waiting for my refund for THREE WEEKS. Every time I contact support I get the same copy-paste response. This is the worst customer service I've ever experienced. I want to speak to a manager RIGHT NOW.
Hi, do you ship to Andaman and Nicobar Islands? I saw on the website that you deliver to all Indian pincodes but I want to confirm before ordering.
